name: create_ticket
description: Create a new IT support ticket. The ticket will be assigned to the IT team for resolution.

category.description: Ticket category. Must be one of: 'hardware', 'software', 'network', 'access', 'other'

subject.description: Brief subject line for the ticket, e.g. 'Laptop not charging'

priority.description: Priority level. Must be one of: 'low', 'medium', 'high', 'urgent'. Default is 'medium'.
